name: Duros S.A.
summary: Duros S.A. operates as a menswear company in Greece. It offers shirts, polo shirts, knitwear and cardigans, T-shirts, trousers, jackets, suits, blazers, and shoes. The company operates 30 retail shops all over Greece under the DUR label, as well as exports to the Middle East, Lebanon, Albania, Cyprus, the Czech Republic, and Bulgaria. It also sells its products online. The company was founded in 1960 and is based in Patras, Greece.
